description: Create a scenario to analyze high-performance windows in the 4StoreyBuilding model without overwriting the baseline design. Configure a Parametric Run named 'Low-E Retrofit' that modifies all glass types by setting SHADING-COEF to 0.35 and GLASS-CONDUCTANCE to 0.28. Execute the simulation for both the baseline and the 'Low-E Retrofit' run and save the project.
